description.value:
Skill Path: Warding

Crystals offer some unique healing options. You know all of them.

While developing your skills in Occultism you chose to focus specifically on Warding, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.6O8MoMheHs5hNHX1]{Crystal Healing}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.22P7IFyhrF7Fbw8B]{Root Magic}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.6O8MoMheHs5hNHX1]{Crystal Healing}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.22P7IFyhrF7Fbw8B]{Root Magic}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.j9CKXcpc0jB8yAf9]{Crystal Medicine}
  • Master: choose one of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.zGrUu3dUtqHrqGuo]{Break Curse}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.MSyU208twPGKU16W]{Calm and Centered}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.MMaUL7r99DY7nvds]{Comforting Presence}
